one_line_rationale: Dossier: KD removes HIF-1beta, obligate partner of HIF-2alpha, collapsing the HIF-2alpha->GATA3 Th2 circuit; T-bet/IFNg has no HIF requirement — cleanest off-receptor route, medium confidence.

Dossier: HOIL-1L/LUBAC loss dampens NF-kB p50-selective GATA3/IL-4 arm (Das 2001) while c-Rel/RelA carry Th1 — NF-kB subunit selectivity, off the IL-4R spine; tempered by 2025 LUBAC-dispensable counter-evidence.
Dossier: loss removes MOZ/HBO1 HAT scaffold (H3K14ac), destabilizing GATA3-supported program via chromatin, no T-bet rise — off-axis chromatin route but confounded by BRPF1's proliferation role.
No deep dossier; polyprenol/dolichol reductase feeding N-glycosylation (CDG gene) — generic metabolic/glycosylation route off the IL-4R/STAT6/GATA3 spine; provisional, global-magnitude confound risk.
No deep dossier; ER acetyl-CoA transporter (AT-1) for secretory-protein acetylation/autophagy — metabolic route off the IL-4R spine; provisional, broad secretory/global confound risk.
No deep dossier; G-patch RNA-processing/spliceosome cofactor with no Th2 wiring — off-axis RNA-processing route; provisional, high global-magnitude confound risk.
No deep dossier; deoxyhypusine hydroxylase completing eIF5A/hypusine maturation — translation/metabolic route off the Th2 spine; provisional, strong translation/proliferation confound risk.
No deep dossier; N-methylpurine DNA glycosylase (base-excision repair) with no Th2 wiring — off-axis genome-maintenance route; provisional, high global/proliferation confound risk.

Dossier: c-Myc-induced bHLH-ZIP; footprint runs via loss of IL-2Ra-STAT5 proliferative program feeding GATA3/IL-4, sparing STAT5-independent Th1 — converges on GATA3 off the IL-4R receptor but heavily proliferation-confounded, no established Th2 wiring.

Dossier explicitly routes through autocrine loop: TGN trafficking loss blunts IL-4 secretion + IL-4Ra surface delivery, starving the IL-4->STAT6->GATA3 feedback — same axis Dupixent hits, different node.
Dossier explicitly routes through autocrine loop: disrupted endosomal recycling of a Th2-supporting surface receptor (IL-4Ra->STAT6->GATA3) — on the Dupixent axis, upstream trafficking node.

No deep dossier; PDI/ER disulfide folding of secreted+surface proteins incl. IL-4Ra — same secretory-starvation logic as ARL1/RAB21 feeds the autocrine IL-4->STAT6 loop; provisional, Th1 markers trend up (th1_z=+1.0), broad secretory confound.
The STAT6 node itself — the transducer Dupixent's IL-4Ra blockade acts through; known-Th2 calibration control, directly Dupixent-competitive, no novelty value.
The Th2 master TF and terminal node of the IL-4R->STAT6->GATA3 spine; known-Th2 calibration control, on-axis by definition, no novelty value.

Dossier argues against hit: Nedd4-adaptor substrates JunB/JAK1 are POSITIVE Th2 drivers, so canonical biology predicts KD should RAISE IL-4/IL-5 — Th2-down footprint likely off-axis/redundancy artifact, not genuine selective suppression.

Dossier argues against hit: HP1alpha's best CD4 role represses Th1 (Ifng/Tbx21) to stabilize Th2 (Allan 2012); under real polarization KD should de-repress Th1 — selectivity likely a non-polarized-context artifact.
